name: the-savior
description: The Savior - Buddhist mind-body stabilization platform

scripts.dev:ollama: if [ ! -f .dev.vars ]; then cp .dev.vars.example .dev.vars; fi; wrangler pages dev public --compatibility-date=2025-01-15 --port 8788
scripts.check: node --check functions/api/_logger.js && node --check functions/api/_security.js && node --check functions/api/_runtime.js && node --check functions/api/chat.js && node --check functions/api/config.js && node --check functions/api/key-check.js && node --check functions/api/health.js && node --check functions/api/meta.js && node --check functions/api/runtime-brief.js && node --check functions/api/escalation-readiness.js && node --check functions/api/review-pack.js && node --check functions/api/schema/coach-response.js && node --check public/app.js
